name: shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4
description: Set up shadcn/ui with Tailwind CSS v4 in a Next.js project. Includes dark mode, custom theme tokens, 10 most-used components (Button, Dialog, Sheet, Form, Table, etc.), and Storybook for component development.

steps.description: Initialize shadcn/ui (selects style, base color, CSS variables)

steps.target: npx shadcn@latest add button dialog sheet form table card badge toast

steps.description: Configure Tailwind v4 @theme block with custom colors, fonts, and spacing
Create dark/light mode toggle using next-themes
